content.problemStatement:
Selina is Jon’s girlfriend.  They had planned to go for a date this evening, but Jon is stuck with a problem at work.

He has a string SSS of length NNN, containing all lower case alphabets. The string contains a odd occurring character (characters that is present odd times). The task is to find the character (if not present print −1-1−1). Jon is already late for his date, so help him solve this as quickly as possible.


Input Format

First line will contain TTT, number of testcases. Then the testcases follow.
Each testcase contains of a single line of input, one string SSS.


Output Format

Print the character.
If no such character is present, print −1-1−1.
constraints: sum of NNN over all test cases doesn't exceed 10610^6106

sampleTestCases.explanation:
Explanation:
Case 1: ccc is occurred 333 times i.e odd number of times.
Case 2: ccc is occurring only 111 time.
Case 3: no odd occurring character is present, printed −1-1−1.
